Join Our Team

Build your career with a growing insurance agency that values integrity, service, and excellence. Explore opportunities across our 15 licensed states.

Why Work With PCFG Insurance?

We're building something special, and we're looking for talented individuals to join us on this journey.

Growth Opportunities

Expand your skills and advance your career with our growing agency across 15 states.

Supportive Culture

Work in a collaborative environment where your contributions are valued and recognized.

Competitive Benefits

Enjoy comprehensive benefits including health insurance, retirement plans, and professional development.

Current Openings

Explore our current job opportunities and find the perfect fit for your skills and career goals.

Insurance Sales Producer

Full-Time
Remote (Multiple States)

We're seeking motivated insurance sales professionals to join our growing team. In this role, you'll develop new business opportunities and build relationships with clients across multiple states.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Generate and qualify new business leads
  • Conduct needs analyses for prospective clients
  • Develop and present insurance proposals
  • Build and maintain client relationships
  • Meet or exceed sales goals

Requirements:

  • Property & Casualty license (or ability to obtain)
  • 1+ years of insurance sales experience preferred
  • Strong communication and relationship-building skills
  • Self-motivated with a proven track record of success
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team
Apply Now

Life & Health Insurance Rep

Full-Time
Remote (Multiple States)

Join our team as a Life & Health Insurance Representative to help clients secure their financial future and protect their health. You'll provide expert guidance on life insurance, health plans, and related products.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Consult with clients on life and health insurance needs
  • Conduct thorough needs analyses and financial reviews
  • Present appropriate insurance solutions
  • Guide clients through application and underwriting
  • Provide ongoing service and policy reviews

Requirements:

  • Life & Health insurance license (or ability to obtain)
  • 2+ years of life/health insurance sales experience preferred
  • Strong understanding of insurance products and underwriting
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Commitment to ethical sales practices and client service
Apply Now

Commercial Lines Account Manager

Full-Time
Remote (Multiple States)

We're looking for an experienced Commercial Lines Account Manager to handle a book of business and provide exceptional service to our commercial clients.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Manage a book of commercial insurance clients
  • Process renewals, endorsements, and policy changes
  • Conduct coverage reviews and make recommendations
  • Assist with claims reporting and resolution
  • Maintain client relationships and provide exceptional service

Requirements:

  • Active Property & Casualty license
  • 3+ years of commercial lines experience
  • Strong knowledge of commercial insurance products
  • Experience with agency management systems
  • Excellent communication and organizational skills
Apply Now

Employee Benefits Rep

Full-Time
Remote (Multiple States)

We're seeking an experienced Employee Benefits Representative to help businesses design and implement comprehensive benefits packages for their employees. You'll be a key advisor in helping companies attract and retain talent.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Consult with businesses on employee benefits strategies
  • Design custom benefits packages (health, dental, vision, life)
  • Analyze client needs and recommend appropriate solutions
  • Coordinate with carriers for quotes and plan implementation
  • Provide ongoing service and annual plan reviews

Requirements:

  • Life & Health insurance license
  • 3+ years of employee benefits experience
  • Strong knowledge of group health plans and ACA requirements
  • Experience with benefits administration platforms
  • Excellent presentation and communication skills
Apply Now

No Current Openings

We don't have any open positions at the moment, but we're always looking for talented individuals to join our team. Submit your resume for future consideration.

Please fill out the form below to apply for a position with PCFG Insurance Services.

Employee Benefits

We believe in taking care of our team members with competitive benefits and a supportive work environment.

Health & Wellness

  • • Health insurance (accessible, agent paid)
  • • Dental and vision coverage (accessible, agent paid)
  • • Life insurance
  • • Disability insurance
  • • Wellness program

Financial Benefits

  • • Competitive compensation
  • • Performance bonuses
  • • Commission opportunities
  • • Profit sharing

Work-Life Balance

  • • Flexible work schedules
  • • Remote work options
  • • Paid time off
  • • Paid holidays
  • • Parental leave

Professional Development

  • • Continuing education
  • • License renewal assistance
  • • Industry certifications
  • • Mentorship program
  • • Career advancement opportunities

Team Building

  • • Company events
  • • Team celebrations
  • • Recognition programs
  • • Community service opportunities
  • • Collaborative work environment

Additional Perks

  • • Employee discounts on insurance
  • • Modern technology and tools
  • • Casual dress code
  • • Referral bonuses

Our Culture

At PCFG Insurance Services, we foster a culture of collaboration, integrity, and excellence.

What Makes Us Different

Veteran-Owned

Our military values of service, integrity, and excellence guide everything we do.

Client-Focused

We put our clients' needs first and work tirelessly to exceed their expectations.

Growth Mindset

We're constantly learning, improving, and expanding to better serve our clients.

Team Collaboration

We work together, support each other, and celebrate our collective successes.

Work-Life Balance

We value our team members' well-being and encourage a healthy balance between work and personal life.

Employee Testimonials

"Joining PCFG Insurance was the best career move I've made. The supportive environment, growth opportunities, and work-life balance are unmatched in the industry."

- Sarah T., Insurance Producer

"I appreciate how PCFG invests in our professional development. They've supported my continuing education and helped me earn additional certifications."

- Michael R., Account Manager

"The remote work flexibility has been a game-changer for me. I can serve clients across multiple states while maintaining a great work-life balance."

- Jennifer L., Customer Service Representative

Ready to Join Our Team?

Take the next step in your insurance career with PCFG Insurance Services. Apply today or contact us to learn more about our opportunities.
